title: Narayana Health South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
